zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriel de Courtenay於大約1339年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay28歲，母親Muriel De Moels18歲。她於1357年3月27日之前與Sir John de Dinham ,Knight結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年8月12日之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文哈特藍德哈特藍德 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muriel de Courtenay于大约1339年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay28岁，母亲Muriel De Moels18岁。她于1357年3月27日之前与Sir John de Dinham ,Knight结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年8月12日之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文哈特藍德哈特藍德 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Muriel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin ( see Muireall ). Forms of the name are found in Breton as well as in Irish and Scottish Gaelic, and in the form Meriel it was in use in the heart of England in the Middle Ages. The surname Merrill is derived from it. As Muriel it was at first used mainly in Scotland, but became more widely popular during the first half of the 20th century. Since then it has fallen from favour again.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriel de Courtenay was born about 1339, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, was 28 and her mother, Muriel De Moels, was 18. She married Sir John de Dinham ,Knight before 27 March 1357. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 12 August 1369, in her hometown, and was buried in Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, England: Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriel de Courtenay est née environ 1339, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Muriel De Moels, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Dinham ,Knight avant 27 mars 1357. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 12 août 1369, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, England: Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Muriel de Courtenay um 1339 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay 28 und ihre Mutter Muriel De Moels 18. Sie hat vor 27. März 1357 Sir John de Dinham ,Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 12. August 1369 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel de Courtenay è nata il circa 1339 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Muriel De Moels, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Dinham ,Knight prima del 27 marzo 1357. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 12 agosto 1369, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하틀랜드 하틀랜드 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Muriel de Courtenay(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muriel De Moels(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1357년 3월 27일 이전 Sir John de Dinham ,Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 8월 12일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하틀랜드 하틀랜드 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel de Courtenay nasceu aproximadamente 1339, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Muriel De Moels, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Dinham ,Knight antes 27 de março de 1357. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 12 de agosto de 1369, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Hartland Abbey, Hartland, Devon, England: хартланд эбби, хартланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriel de Courtenay родилась около 1339 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel De Moels, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Dinham ,Knight перед 27 марта 1357 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 12 августа 1369 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности хартланд эбби, хартланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
